title: Ressources recommandees — AI Leadership for Executives
description: Bibliographie curatee pour le programme AILE. Chaque ressource est taguee par module et par type pour faciliter le filtrage.

resources.title: The State of AI: How organizations are rewiring to capture value
resources.author: McKinsey & Company
resources.description_fr: Enquete annuelle McKinsey sur l'adoption de l'IA : taux d'adoption, defis de mise a l'echelle, ecarts entre leaders et retardataires.
resources.description_en: Annual McKinsey survey on AI adoption: adoption rates, scaling challenges, gaps between leaders and laggards.

resources.title: AI Radar 2025
resources.author: Boston Consulting Group (BCG)
resources.description_fr: Enquete BCG aupres de 1 803 dirigeants : 75% classent l'IA dans leur top 3 des priorites, mais seulement 25% en tirent une valeur significative.
resources.description_en: BCG survey of 1,803 executives: 75% rank AI in their top 3 priorities, but only 25% derive significant value.

resources.title: Build for the Future: Cracking the Code on AI Value at Scale
resources.author: Boston Consulting Group (BCG)
resources.description_fr: Etude BCG sur 1 250 entreprises : le framework 10-20-70 (10% algorithmes, 20% technologie, 70% donnees et processus). Seulement 5% des entreprises obtiennent une valeur IA a l'echelle.
resources.description_en: BCG study of 1,250 companies: the 10-20-70 framework (10% algorithms, 20% technology, 70% data and processes). Only 5% achieve AI value at scale.

resources.title: AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
resources.author: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
resources.description_fr: Cadre de reference pour la gestion des risques IA : 4 fonctions (Govern, Map, Measure, Manage). Standard non-contraignant mais largement adopte.
resources.description_en: Reference framework for AI risk management: 4 functions (Govern, Map, Measure, Manage). Non-binding but widely adopted standard.

resources.title: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 — Artificial Intelligence Management System
resources.author: International Organization for Standardization (ISO)
resources.description_fr: Premiere norme internationale pour un systeme de management de l'IA. Structure certifiable, approche par les risques.
resources.description_en: First international standard for an AI management system. Certifiable structure, risk-based approach.

resources.title: EU AI Act (Reglement europeen sur l'intelligence artificielle)
resources.author: European Parliament & Council
resources.description_fr: Premiere reglementation contraignante sur l'IA au monde. Classification par niveaux de risque (inacceptable, haut, limite, minimal). Applicable 2025-2026.
resources.description_en: World's first binding AI regulation. Risk-level classification (unacceptable, high, limited, minimal). Applicable 2025-2026.

resources.title: OECD AI Principles
resources.author: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD)
resources.description_fr: Principes adoptes par 46 pays : croissance inclusive, valeurs humaines, transparence, robustesse, responsabilite.
resources.description_en: Principles adopted by 46 countries: inclusive growth, human values, transparency, robustness, accountability.

resources.title: Recommendation on the Ethics of Artificial Intelligence
resources.author: UNESCO
resources.description_fr: Premier instrument normatif mondial sur l'ethique de l'IA. 193 Etats membres. Particulierement pertinent pour les pays en developpement.
resources.description_en: First global normative instrument on AI ethics. 193 member states. Particularly relevant for developing countries.

resources.title: Gartner AI Maturity Model
resources.author: Gartner
resources.description_fr: Modele de maturite IA en 5 niveaux (Awareness, Active, Operational, Systemic, Transformational). Cadre de reference pour l'auto-evaluation strategique.
resources.description_en: 5-level AI maturity model (Awareness, Active, Operational, Systemic, Transformational). Reference framework for strategic self-assessment.

resources.title: Artificial Intelligence Capability: Conceptualization, measurement calibration, and empirical study
resources.author: Mikalef, P. & Gupta, M.
resources.description_fr: Article de reference sur la capacite IA organisationnelle : combinaison de ressources tangibles (infrastructure), intangibles (donnees, algorithmes) et humaines (competences, culture).
resources.description_en: Reference paper on organizational AI capability: combination of tangible (infrastructure), intangible (data, algorithms), and human (skills, culture) resources.

resources.title: AI for Everyone
resources.author: Andrew Ng (DeepLearning.AI / Coursera)
resources.description_fr: Cours non-technique de 6 heures sur l'IA pour dirigeants. Excellent complement au Module 01 d'AILE.
resources.description_en: 6-hour non-technical AI course for executives. Excellent complement to AILE Module 01.

resources.title: Competing in the Age of AI
resources.author: Iansiti, M. & Lakhani, K.R. (Harvard Business Review Press)
resources.description_fr: Comment l'IA restructure les modeles d'affaires. Operating model de l'entreprise AI-native vs traditionnelle.
resources.description_en: How AI restructures business models. Operating model of AI-native vs traditional companies.

resources.title: An executive primer on AI strategy
resources.author: McKinsey & Company
resources.description_fr: Guide synthetique McKinsey pour construire une strategie IA : identification des use cases, evaluation du ROI, gouvernance.
resources.description_en: McKinsey executive guide for building an AI strategy: use case identification, ROI evaluation, governance.

resources.title: NIST Generative AI Profile
resources.author: NIST
resources.description_fr: Complément du NIST AI RMF pour les risques spécifiques à l'IA générative : hallucinations, biais, sécurité, usage abusif.
resources.description_en: Complement to NIST AI RMF for GenAI-specific risks: hallucinations, bias, security, misuse.

resources.title: People + AI Guidebook
resources.author: Google PAIR
resources.description_fr: Guide pratique pour concevoir des produits IA centrés utilisateur. Utile pour l'adoption et la confiance.
resources.description_en: Practical guide for designing human-centered AI products. Useful for adoption and trust.

resources.title: Microsoft Responsible AI Standard v2
resources.author: Microsoft
resources.description_fr: Exemple concret d'opérationnalisation des principes d'IA responsable dans une grande entreprise.
resources.description_en: Concrete example of operationalizing Responsible AI principles in a large enterprise.

resources.title: AI Index Report 2025
resources.author: Stanford HAI
resources.description_fr: Rapport annuel de référence sur les tendances IA mondiales : investissements, recherche, adoption, gouvernance.
resources.description_en: Reference annual report on global AI trends: investment, research, adoption, governance.

resources.title: State of Generative AI in the Enterprise
resources.author: Deloitte
resources.description_fr: Adoption GenAI en entreprise, investissements, ROI, défis de mise à l'échelle.
resources.description_en: Enterprise GenAI adoption, investments, ROI, scaling challenges.

resources.title: AI Literacy for the Top Management Team
resources.author: Pinski et al.
resources.description_fr: La littératie IA de l'équipe dirigeante influence l'orientation IA de l'entreprise et sa capacité d'implémentation.
resources.description_en: Executive AI literacy influences corporate AI orientation and implementation ability.

resources.title: AI at Work: Momentum Builds, but Gaps Remain
resources.author: BCG
resources.description_fr: Adoption IA par les employés, culture, formation. 36% seulement sont satisfaits de leur formation IA.
resources.description_en: Employee AI adoption, culture, training. Only 36% are satisfied with their AI training.

resources.title: Generative AI for Everyone
resources.author: Andrew Ng / DeepLearning.AI
resources.description_fr: Cours GenAI pour managers et dirigeants : usages quotidiens, prompt engineering, limites.
resources.description_en: GenAI course for managers and executives: daily uses, prompt engineering, limits.

resources.title: AI: Implications for Business Strategy
resources.author: MIT Sloan / MIT CSAIL
resources.description_fr: Programme executive de référence : stratégie, technologie, impacts économiques et sociaux de l'IA.
resources.description_en: Reference executive program: strategy, technology, economic and social impacts of AI.

resources.title: Elements of AI
resources.author: University of Helsinki / MinnaLearn
resources.description_fr: Cours gratuit, accessible, non technique. Bon prérequis pour participants peu familiers avec l'IA.
resources.description_en: Free, accessible, non-technical AI course. Good prerequisite for less familiar participants.

resources.title: Stanford HAI YouTube Channel
resources.author: Stanford Human-Centered AI
resources.description_fr: Chaîne vidéo sur l'IA responsable, gouvernance, politique publique, risques et impact sociétal.
resources.description_en: Video channel on responsible AI, governance, public policy, risks and societal impact.

resources.title: NIST AI RMF Introduction Videos
resources.author: NIST
resources.description_fr: Support vidéo pour comprendre et implémenter le NIST AI Risk Management Framework.
resources.description_en: Video support for understanding and implementing the NIST AI Risk Management Framework.
